subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down from the heaven of Will as a token of His grace, and verily, I am the All-Bountiful. This is a remembrance from Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن من سماء المشیه فضلا من عنده و انا الکریم هذا ذکر من عندنا
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world
